user.title: Guest Detector Setup
user.description: Configure guest detection based on energy consumption patterns from Eloverblik. Uses a sliding window with seasonal awareness (heating floor Oct-Feb).

data_description.energy_entity: The Eloverblik energy statistic sensor with long-term statistics.
data_description.window_size: Number of days for the baseline window. Uses 25th percentile to ignore visit spikes (default: 30).
data_description.threshold: Energy must exceed baseline by this factor (default: 1.5 = 50% above baseline).
data_description.min_excess: Minimum absolute kWh above baseline to trigger detection (default: 2.0). Prevents false positives when baseline is very low.
data_description.heating_floor: Minimum baseline in heating season (Oct-Feb) to account for frost protection energy (default: 3.0 kWh).
